name: tracabot
description: OpenClaw skill tools for DKG-powered Telegram fraud intelligence, review, and operator triage.

tools.name: scan_target
tools.description: Score a Telegram actor, wallet text, or message context using local fraud heuristics plus DKG Shared Memory. Does not execute Telegram actions.

tools.name: explain_event
tools.description: Return structured local/DKG evidence for a tracabot event ID.

tools.name: get_watchlist
tools.description: Return local active watches, mutes, and review items. Local-only and never written to DKG.

tools.name: get_digest
tools.description: Return a structured 24h moderation digest for OpenClaw operator triage.

tools.name: query_campaigns
tools.description: Return locally known fraud campaign clusters and their related events.

tools.name: monitor_chat_event
tools.description: Classify an unsafe, scam, spam, phishing, or scam-advertisement chat event and write it to DKG v10 Shared Memory. It is only eligible for verified Context Graph publication when adminVerified is true or confidence is very high.

tools.name: sort_conversation_artifact
tools.description: OpenClaw sorter for scam, spam, phishing, warning, weak-report, or false-positive conversation artifacts. Writes high-quality artifacts to DKG v10 Shared Memory without granting enforcement authority.

tools.name: submit_appeal
tools.description: Write an evidence-backed appeal/correction event to DKG Shared Memory.

tools.name: review_event
tools.description: Write an admin review decision to DKG Shared Memory.

tools.name: decide_artefact_action
tools.description: High-quality decision (artefact curator): should this chat event or conversation artefact stay in local Working Memory, commit to DKG Shared Memory, or be queued for admin /review? Performs live queries against the Tracabot Context Graph for prior admin actions (including cross-group history) + quality scoring. Used by learning loop, live bot, and external agents.

tools.name: generate_safe_tip
tools.description: Generate a short, varied, calm, non-alarmist safety reminder (max ~140 chars) for the community. Topics rotate: DM scams, seed phrases, verification habits, staying on TRAC. Used for low-volume proactive education posts.

network: api.telegram.org when run as Telegram bot
permissions.dkgWrites: Evidence-backed events only. Watchlist and digest tools stay local-only.
